title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 334.746 - Staff for health care provider — certification
text:
334.746.  Staff for health care provider — certification. — All staff for the health care providers certification and registration program shall be provided by the director of the department of commerce and insurance through the director of the division of professional registration.
(L. 1989 S.B. 217 § 10, A.L. 2008 S.B. 788)
